BrakeTandemAxleFrontBalanceTest.Description: Front side to side brake balance out of limits

SoundLevelReadSoundMeterBattery.Description: Read the battery voltage for the sound pressure meter

SoundLevelReadSoundMeterTemp.Description: Read the internal temperature for the sound pressure meter

SoundLevelSoundMeterTimeWeight.Description: Set the time weighting for the sound pressure level test

SoundLevelStopSoundTest.Description: Stop monitoring the sound pressure and report results

BrakeAccelerateToParkBrakeSpeed.Description: Accelerate to Dynamic Park Brake Speed

BrakeAnalyzeDragTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Drag Test Analysis

BrakeDragTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Drag Test

BrakeDynamicParkDragTest.Description: Base Brake Component dynamic park brake drag test

BrakeFrontToRearBalanceTest.Description: Front To Rear Balance Test Result

BrakeLeftFrontParkBrakeForceTest.Description: LeftFront Park Brake Force Test Result

BrakeRearBalanceTest.Description: LR to RR Balance Test Result

BrakeRightFrontParkBrakeForceTest.Description: RightFront Park Brake Force Test Result

BrakeTandemAxleFrontBalanceTest.Description: Front side to side brake balance out of limits

MachineBrakeToStop.Description: Prompt the driver to brake to stop

MachineMachineReady.Description: Wait until the machine is ready to perform a test

SoundLevelIdleHornTest.Description: Check the result of the sound level measurement

SoundLevelReadSoundMeterBattery.Description: Read the battery voltage for the sound pressure meter

SoundLevelReadSoundMeterTemp.Description: Read the internal temperature for the sound pressure meter

SoundLevelRunningHornTest.Description: Check the result of the sound level measurement

SoundLevelSoundMeterTimeWeight.Description: Set the time weighting for the sound pressure level test

SoundLevelStopSoundTest.Description: Stop monitoring the sound pressure and report results

SpeedometerSpeedometerTest.Description: Prompt the driver to accelerate to the speedometer test speed

TransmissionAccelerationTest.Description: Accelerate to armspeed within alotted time

TransmissionBrakeToStop.Description: Prompt the driver to brake to stop
